recommendations.title: Underdog
recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A lab accident gives a beagle named Shoeshine some serious superpowers -- a secret that the dog eventually shares with the young boy who becomes his owner and friend.

recommendations.title: Megamind
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: After Megamind, a highly intelligent alien supervillain, defeats his long-time nemesis Metro Man, Megamind creates a new hero to fight, but must act to save the city when his "creation" becomes an even worse villain than he was.

recommendations.title: Turbo Kid
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, an orphaned teen must battle a ruthless warlord to save the girl of his dreams.
recommendations.director: François Simard, Anouk Whissell, Yoann-Karl Whissell

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Fun Size
recommendations.overview: Wren's Halloween plans go awry when she's made to babysit her brother, who disappears into a sea of trick-or-treaters. Accompanied by her best friend and two nerdy classmates, Wren needs to find her brother before her mom finds out.

recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet the Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: As novice detectives, Bud and Lou come face to face with the Invisible Man.

recommendations.title: The Black Devil and the White Prince
recommendations.overview: Yū Akahane moves to a dormitory room after her father's transfer from work. She is excited that she will live in the same dorm as Takumi Shirakawa, aka "White Prince." Yet, Haruto Kurosaki, aka "Black Devil", kisses her as punishment for going agains

recommendations.title: Attack the Block
recommendations.overview: A teen gang in a South London housing estate must team up with the other residents to protect their neighbourhood from a terrifying alien invasion.

recommendations.title: One Battle After Another
recommendations.overview: Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, fath

recommendations.title: Ainbo: Spirit of the Amazon
recommendations.overview: An epic journey of a young hero and her Spirit Guides, 'Dillo' a cute and humorous armadillo and "Vaca" a goofy oversized tapir, who embark on a quest to save their home in the spectacular Amazon Rainforest.
